name: cursor-usage-for-teams
description: Show Cursor monthly usage for teams in the status bar.

commands.title: Cursor Monthly Usage: Clear Stored Token
Cursor Monthly Usage: Toggle Daily / Total View

cursorUsageForTeams.apiBaseUrl.description: Cursor web API origin for usage-summary requests. Must be HTTPS.

cursorUsageForTeams.pollIntervalSeconds.description: How often to refresh usage in the background.

cursorUsageForTeams.displayFormat.description: Status bar format for the total (period) view.

enumDescriptions: Use the same format as displayFormat.
Average vs recommended, e.g. $5.22 / $8.55 per day.
Percent of the daily budget left, e.g. 39% left.
cursorUsageForTeams.dailyDisplayFormat.description: Status bar format for the daily (per-usage-day) view. 'inherit' follows displayFormat.

cursorUsageForTeams.defaultView.description: Which view the status bar starts in. Toggle at runtime with the Toggle Daily / Total View command.

cursorUsageForTeams.usageDays.description: Days of the week you actually use the AI (may include weekends). Used to compute the recommended and average spend per usage day. Empty/invalid falls back to Monday–Friday.

enumDescriptions: Recommended per day = remaining / remaining usage days. Self-corrects your pace.
Recommended per day = limit / total usage days in the period. Fixed monthly target.
cursorUsageForTeams.dailyBudgetStrategy.description: How the recommended spend per usage day is calculated for the daily view.

cursorUsageForTeams.warningRemainingPerc.description: Warn when remaining usage is at or below this percent.

cursorUsageForTeams.criticalRemainingPer.description: Show an error color when remaining usage is at or below this percent.

cursorUsageForTeams.enableLocalTokenDisc.description: Read Cursor local state.vscdb to find the session token and user id.
